title: Project Miner Local PM Intake Workflow Map Disclosure Controls
objective: Reduce day-to-day PM workbench scan burden by wrapping only the existing /pm-review/import-intake Local PM Intake Workflow Map panel in a browser-native, default-open disclosure control while preserving its placement inside Workflow Review Panels, seven derived workflow-map items, labels, hrefs, order, status pills, dynamic text, no-storage behavior, no-authority wording, read seam, and no-authority boundary.
active_role: Technical Repo Authority / PM Product Coordinator / AI Orchestration Usability Implementer
implemented_scope: Convert the existing Local PM Intake Workflow Map panel wrapper to a native default-open disclosure control.
Preserve the existing pm-workflow-map id and Local PM intake workflow map aria label.
Keep the map inside Workflow Review Panels.
Preserve the map's seven derived items, labels, hrefs, order, status pills, dynamic text, no-storage behavior, and no-authority wording.
Preserve existing storage behavior, read seams, route links, quick-jump rail, output actions, output statuses, handoff-guide disclosure, helper disclosures, and detail disclosures.

Add focused smoke coverage proving default-open state, collapse/reopen behavior, hidden/visible workflow-map items, unchanged link counts and href targets, absence of workflow-map disclosure-state localStorage keys, and continued PM Lane 083 authority guard posture.
Update PM lane operating docs, project status, packet, and handoff.
sidecar_result: A read-only sidecar from PM Lane 090 recommended PM Lane 091 as Local PM Intake Workflow Map Disclosure Controls after the handoff-guide disclosure pattern landed. The recommendation was accepted as a browser-local AI/orchestration workflow ergonomics slice. A separate read-only sidecar completed a PM Lane 092 scout and recommended Local PM Intake Open Items Lens Disclosure Controls as the next non-overlapping lane, with no write ownership in this tranche.
